message: Read all existing systems and models, ready to write MoveExecutionSystem
Starting implementation of GameFlowSystem (P5.T1). Analyzed all dependencies: GamePhaseModel, DealSystem, UndoSystem, HintSystem, BoardModel, ScoreModel, all message types confirmed.

GameFlowSystem written to Assets/Scripts/Systems/GameFlowSystem.cs. Pure C# (no UnityEngine), IDisposable, CompositeDisposable subscriptions, all state transitions per TDD 8.11. DealSystem.CreateDeal() already publishes DealCompletedMessage internally; GameFlowSystem also publishes it after phase transitions complete as a game-ready signal.
